blockingIssues.description: src/commands/init.rs still uses local detect_shell_for_init() in cmd_init; this bypasses parent-process fallback in src/shell.rs and leaves shell-init-install fix incomplete when SHELL is unset.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: When patching behavior owned by a shared module (e.g., shell detection), require a quick call-site audit to ensure command-level wrappers are not bypassing the updated module function.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Round-2 fix updated src/shell.rs but cmd_init continued to call a separate init-local detector in src/commands/init.rs, leaving the original shell fallback issue unresolved.
